nodes.label: ElectronSshManager
nodes.summary: Manages SSH ControlMaster connections, remote OpenChamber lifecycle, port forwarding, and tunnel monitoring

nodes.label: SSH ControlMaster connection
nodes.summary: Persistent SSH ControlMaster with multiplexed connections, ControlPersist, and socket file management

nodes.label: remote OpenChamber management
nodes.summary: Install/update/start OpenChamber server on remote hosts over SSH; supports managed and external modes

nodes.label: SSH port forwarding
nodes.summary: Local, remote, dynamic port forwarding via SSH; tunnel health monitoring and auto-reconnect

nodes.label: SSH askpass script
nodes.summary: Bash/osascript SSH_ASKPASS helper for password/passphrase prompting and yes/no host key confirmation

nodes.label: SSH instance lifecycle
nodes.summary: Config resolve → auth check → ControlMaster → remote probe → server install/update → forward setup → monitor (with auto-reconnect)

hyperedges.label: SSH Connection System
hyperedges.summary: Complete SSH subsystem: config import/parsing, ControlMaster connections, remote OpenChamber lifecycle management, port forwarding, health monitoring with auto-reconnect
